heading: Binding at expense of Members of Congress
label: 736 Binding at expense of Members of Congress
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office may bind at the Government Publishing Office books, maps, charts, or documents published by authority of Congress, upon application of a Member of Congress, and payment of the actual cost of binding.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 171 (, ).Dec. 10, 1877, ch. 620 Stat. 5
Amendments2014—, substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235, § 1301(c)(1)
